issues.title: Unified domain model and intake contract migration
issues.description: Finish consolidating the canonical Go task, intake, and workflow vocabulary so downstream runtime slices stop inventing parallel compatibility contracts.

issues.title: Risk, policy, and approval semantics migration
issues.description: Keep porting governance, execution-contract, audit, and policy semantics into Go so review and approval behavior no longer depends on Python-only code paths.

issues.title: Workflow orchestration and scheduler loop migration
issues.description: Close the Go execution loop with workflow-aware orchestration, journal state, and runtime closeout so active development no longer needs the Python workflow engine.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Completed the Go workflow execution slice by adding a workflow engine with journal/report closeout handling, exposing a `/v2/workflows/run` API endpoint that reuses the worker runtime, and wiring the daemon server to provide runtime-backed workflow execution.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/workflow ./internal/api` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass).
Commit: `68a25dc8d458010d65de75c07b7158f9feff24cc`.
PR URL: unavailable in this workspace because `origin` points to `/Users/jxrt/Desktop/symphony-main/BigClaw` rather than a GitHub remote.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Updated the Go orchestrator loop so each scheduler tick derives live quota inputs from the current queue instead of reusing the bootstrap snapshot. This now feeds queue depth, active leased work, and preemptible capacity into scheduler decisions, with a focused loop test covering live queued vs leased tasks.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && gofmt -w internal/orchestrator/loop.go internal/orchestrator/loop_test.go` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/orchestrator ./internal/scheduler ./internal/worker ./internal/workflow` (pass).
Commit: `ffc682ea98227da27af1d2fc8256d2cd19059665`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Extended the Go workflow/scheduler runtime so takeover-blocked work is parked out of actionable queue capacity, approval-required work is blocked before executor dispatch, computed high-risk workflows also resolve to `needs-approval`, and approval blocks register in control state so the existing release path can unpark them later.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/queue ./internal/worker ./internal/orchestrator ./internal/api` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/scheduler ./internal/worker ./internal/workflow` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass).
Commit: `a6e2a9ea3fc6b8bf693d9d93c5936d595382f92f`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Updated the Go orchestrator loop to run an immediate startup pass and drain runnable queue work within a tick instead of processing only one task per poll interval. Added focused loop coverage for burst processing and for stop conditions when a task is deferred back onto the queue by scheduler policy.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && gofmt -w internal/orchestrator/loop.go internal/orchestrator/loop_test.go` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/orchestrator ./internal/worker ./internal/scheduler ./internal/workflow` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass).
Commit: `1eaa5df1746fceccaff3e093202fcb63617807a0`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Updated the Go workflow engine so scheduler quota guardrails default from task policy when callers omit an explicit snapshot. Workflow runs now inherit policy concurrency, queue-depth, and budget ceilings, with coverage proving an over-budget workflow task is retried by the scheduler instead of bypassing controls.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && gofmt -w internal/workflow/engine.go internal/workflow/engine_test.go` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/workflow ./internal/orchestrator ./internal/worker ./internal/scheduler` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass).
Commit: `18eff71bc63ed2f71c585d03d21532a86d8bff31`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Exposed the effective scheduler quota in Go workflow run artifacts so runtime closeout can explain the exact concurrency, queue-depth, and budget guardrails applied during execution. Workflow run results now return the resolved quota snapshot, execution journal entries capture it, and markdown reports render the same quota summary with focused assertions covering explicit and policy-derived quota paths.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && gofmt -w internal/workflow/engine.go internal/workflow/engine_test.go` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/workflow ./internal/orchestrator ./internal/worker ./internal/scheduler` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass); `git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/symphony/BIG-GOM-303` (same SHA).
Commit: `c427ea147c787cb507c84fcacf6f481f950fbd2c`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Aligned the Go runtime with the execution contract by surfacing a stable `sandbox_profile` across scheduler and worker lifecycle events instead of exposing executor kind alone. Routed, approval-blocked, started, completed, cancelled, retried, and dead-letter payloads now carry a profile that reflects browser, container, distributed, or workspace-write execution paths, with worker coverage asserting the new payloads for browser, approval-gated, and dead-letter flows.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && gofmt -w internal/worker/runtime.go internal/worker/runtime_test.go` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/worker ./internal/scheduler ./internal/workflow` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass); `git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/symphony/BIG-GOM-303` (same SHA).
Commit: `a27d739eda288582dec7555e0208ba7c8e75a57c`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Extended the Go run-detail API and markdown report to expose the runtime `sandbox_profile` carried by scheduler and worker events, so operator-visible execution artifacts now show whether work ran in browser, container, distributed, or workspace-write mode. Event-backed tool traces now return the sandbox profile field in JSON, and the downloadable run report renders the same profile inline for the execution timeline.
Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && gofmt -w internal/api/v2.go internal/api/server_test.go` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/api ./internal/worker ./internal/workflow` (pass); `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` (pass); `git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/symphony/BIG-GOM-303` (same SHA).
Commit: `16c32263ecb14d44237378fc0579e9f066d6f23a`.
PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/139.

issues.title: Observability, reporting, and weekly operations surface migration
issues.description: Move runtime evidence, reporting, and weekly operations closeout onto Go-owned observability outputs that line up with the new execution loop.

issues.title: Control center, triage, and operations view migration
issues.description: Finish moving operator-facing status, control-center, and triage endpoints to Go once the workflow runtime and reporting surfaces are stable.

issues.title: Repo collaboration and lineage surface migration
issues.description: Port the remaining repo board, registry, gateway, linkage, and lineage surfaces into Go without leaking repo-specific concerns into the scheduler runtime.

issues.title: Workflow, bootstrap, and GitHub sync toolchain migration
issues.description: Keep hardening the Go-first bootstrap, refill, and GitHub sync toolchain so unattended multi-issue work no longer relies on Python entrypoints or Linear-only operators.

issues.title: Python deprecation and Go-only mainline switch
issues.description: Freeze or retire the remaining Python runtime entrypoints only after the Go workflow, observability, and repo collaboration surfaces have matching owners and validation.
